parsed_review.summary: CP00-697 (RP23 External Integrations II, finance-integrations) is a descriptor-only, no-write, no-real-data, runtime-closed pack of 150 units (RP23.P01.M06.S05-RP23.P02.M02.S22). Read-only inspection confirms the pack-level descriptor-verified production_ready basis is supported and all hardened-review boundaries hold. Boundaries: validators.js (validateDescriptor) enforces per-row descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, and excludes raw/financial/credential payloads; opening of bank/card/WEHAGO/Douzone/tax/DART runtime, permission-decision detail, cross-tenant access, audit bodies, and real financial data is rejected; FINANCE_INTEGRATIONS_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (registry.js:69) sets every no-write/no-real-data flag. A scan for contradictory true-valued runtime/approval claims (runtime_opened, writes_product_state, emits_runtime_receipt, claude_is_final_approval, real_financial_data_loaded, executes_api_handler, etc.) across the contract, manifest, and construction-inspection returned zero matches. Authority: Claude remains read_only and non-final (claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false), human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, runtime_opening_pack_id=CP00-698; Hermes patterns are used only for deterministic descriptor evidence packets/receipt shapes (receipt_shape=descriptor_only_finance_integrations_no_write, emits_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. Tests: model.test.js covers CP00-697 binding, coverage deep-equality against required deliverable_counts, runtime-closed descriptor assertions, and the contract projection (latest_pack=CP00-697, historical CP694-696). Distribution independently re-counted to 150 units: implementation 77, ui 23, fixture 4, test 20, hermes_evidence 4, claude_review 7, contract 3, security_audit 6, failure_recovery 6 — matching the requirements and prompt. Contract validation block is all valid=true with latest projection FinanceIntegrationsCp697SyntheticEvidenceScopeContractDescriptor; queue/handoff is consistent (next CP00-698 / RP23.P02.M03.S01). No-leak verified: the only credential/secret-adjacent strings are absence-attestation flags (external_credential_included=false) and risk-register labels (credential exposure). Review readiness is clean: auth_preflight passed with valid JSON, prompt 2675 bytes within limit, no full diff/source embedded, forbidden tools absent, no omitted active untracked implementation files; the pack honestly reports itself as pending exactly this review (no premature production_ready=true, empty valid_review_receipts, null receipt_ref). The pack neither claims runtime_ready (false) nor enterprise trust, so per the prompt's instruction blocks_goal_closeout is false. Provenance: the 26-command pre-review validation matrix in command-evidence.json (all exit_code 0) is agent-reported and was not re-executed under read-only tools, but every referenced npm script exists in package.json and all static artifacts are internally consistent. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
